---
title: 'Strongholds - Kairos - Men/Women Cycles'
date: '2014-11-14T13:12:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '8850740799711494418'
blogger_filename: '/2014/11/strongholds-kairos-menwomen-cycles.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
---

<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<h4>
Anatomy of a Stronghold </h4>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="http://gatewaypeople.com/sites/all/files/sermons/sermon_notes/healing_ministry_training_manual_-_week_eight.pdf" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;" target="_blank"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/anatomy-of-a-stronghold-633cdfb2b7b8.png" height="229" width="320" /></a></div>
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<ol>
<li>Event - Caused by external factors, creates a pain point in your life.&nbsp;</li>
<li>Lie - The enemy took this event as an opportunity to tell you a lie about it, that you believed.&nbsp;</li>
<li>Defense/Comfort - Some action that brings comfort and feels right, based on the lie.&nbsp;</li>
<li>Reaction
 - Either other people's reaction to my defense, or a natural by-product
 of the comfort/defense creates a similar event to that which caused the
 lie, and reinforces the lie, so I go deeper into my comfort, and the 
reaction happens again. Thus the cycle is strong with each turn. </li>
</ol>
Example One: Financial Stronghold<br />
<ol>
<li>Event - Financial Set Back</li>
<li>Lie - God Doesn't Come Through/Provide for Me</li>
<li>Comfort/Defense - Seek to spend money on food/fun.</li>
<li>Reaction - Money Spend unwisely creates another financial setback...</li>
</ol>
Example Two: Relationship Stronghold (affected friendships, relationships, sex life, etc...)<br />
<ol>
<li>Event - Rejected/BeatUp/Bullied by a stero-type Male Jock</li>
<li>Lie - I am Intellectually Superior to most men, and all Jocks.</li>
<li>Comfort/Defense
 - Seek affection, comfort, and validation from Women. Keep no male 
friends. Reject sports unless women are there (like gymnastics). Get 
addicted to relationships with women like a drug, moving from one to the
 next rapidly seeking validation. Push most forms of male friendship 
away, in some cases feel greatest satisfaction when I take a woman from a
 male (especially a jock-type).&nbsp;</li>
<ol>
<li>Only friends are women, gay men, or men who show a tendency for favoring intellectual or artistic pursuits over physical ones. </li>
</ol>
<li>Reaction -&nbsp; Men keep their distance, or worse bully. Thus, rejected by men, thus reinforcing the lie...&nbsp;</li>
</ol>
&nbsp;When this stronghold created a need to be validated by women:<br />
<ol>
<li>Event - Woman Rejects Me (or I perceive she does, even if she didn't)</li>
<li>Lie - Either (I'm worthless) or (She's not The One) or Both.&nbsp;</li>
<li>Comfort/Defense - Reject that woman, seek validation from another woman (or seek comfort in pornography)&nbsp;</li>
<li>Reaction - Eventually, I do things that perpetuate either the actual rejection of women, or my perception of it, and the cycle continues...&nbsp; </li>
</ol>
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
